---
title: "test_generate_tests_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_generate_tests_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.45
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.58
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_generate_cases_basic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.generate_tests](file://src.tools.generate_tests)

### Exports
- `test_generate_cases_basic`
